DepthChartID.description: The unique ID of the Depth Chard record

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

PositionCategory.description: The player's position category. Possible values: DH; IF; OF; P; PH; PR

Position.description: Player's position in the depth chart. Note: a player can be listed in multiple positions of the depth chart

DepthOrder.description: The Depth Chart order of the player and where they are placed in the depth chart

Updated.description: The date and time of the last update made to this depth chart (in US Eastern Time)
